programs.title: Beta
programs.desc: Raju, an heir to millions of riches, is devoted to his manipulative stepmother who ploys to extort his wealth. But when Raju's newly-wed wife sees through her plan, she staunchly opposes her, which sets off a war of wits between the two women.

programs.title: Farishtay
programs.desc: Young woman Gayatri is devastated when her husband Arjun is brutally killed. She's even more horrified when she learns that her beloved brothers, Veeru and Dheeru who helped her get married to Arjun, work for a man who killed him.
